events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring hits like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a farm in New York for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. What would your ideal Woodstock lineup be today?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: August 16, 2026 marks 49 years since the death of 'The King of Rock & Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Today marks 49 years since we lost The King, Elvis Presley. His music lives on. What's your favourite Elvis song?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, and died six days later on September 13, 1996, aged 25.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who left us far too soon. His impact on music and culture remains undeniable. What's your defining Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: September 18, 2026 marks 56 years since the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Today marks 56 years since the world lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon and legend. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that iconic voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 51 (UK)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975, four years after its US release.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK. A song that still resonates today. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years since the original iPod dropped and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many songs are in your pocket now?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite 007 movie or moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?
